raw_output:
Beneath the quiet hush of twilight, (whispers the night)
Stars twinkle with gentle might, (a whispering dance)
Moonbeams weave their silken sight, (a whispered serenade)
Guiding us through the endless expanse. (In the night's hushed language)

The world whispers secrets to the breeze, (A nocturnal conversation)
Lullabies of life and dreams, a release, (Whispered melodies that seize)
Nature's orchestra in perfect peace, (Symphony from her easy ease)
While we sleep or watch, entranced, with ease. (In the night's silent decree)

The whispering wind through leaves does sigh, (A gentle lullaby)
Underneath the star-lit sky so high, (Where dreams and stars lie by)
We find peace in the quiet, (whispered whispers in our mind)
In the calm before the morning's grind. (Night's softest, most tender rhyme)
